brid and Embedded Software Systems ( CHESS ) is proud to sponsor six undergraduate students from diverse backgrounds and cultures to participate in the Summer Undergraduate Program in Engineering Research at Berkeley ( SUPERB-IT) . The

ering Research at Berkeley ( SUPERB-IT) . These students have worked with individual mentors throughout the summer, and performed research and supporting activities in the area of hybrid and embedded systems. Each student was invol

d and embedded systems. Each student was involved in an individual project, which may overlap and/or interact with the project of another student. The overview, and goals, of these projects can be found on the projects page , and i
